name: Case Study
history: Strained relationships with parents and a history of feeling judged and disapproved of. Mother's health condition mentioned. Issues related to parental support during education. Mentions of the mother being described as 'broken' and allegations of a past affair.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to prove myself to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough and will always be judged.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and seeking validation from others.
situation: Preparing to attend a Father's Day lunch with parents.
auto_thought: They will judge me and I will feel inadequate.
behavior: Avoidance of direct communication and seeking reassurance from others.
